quotaUser.description: Available to use for quota purposes for server-side applications. Can be any arbitrary string assigned to a user, but should not exceed 40 characters. Overrides userIp if both are provided.

prettyPrint.description: Returns response with indentations and line breaks.

fields.description: Selector specifying which fields to include in a partial response.

oauth_token.description: OAuth 2.0 token for the current user.

key.description: API key. Your API key identifies your project and provides you with API access, quota, and reports. Required unless you provide an OAuth 2.0 token.

list.description: Returns a list of supported languages for translation.

target.description:
The language to use to return localized, human readable names of supported
languages.

model.description: The model type for which supported languages should be returned.

translate.description: Translates input text, returning translated text.

q.description:
The input text to translate. Repeat this parameter to perform translation
operations on multiple text inputs.

target.description:
The language to use for translation of the input text, set to one of the
language codes listed in Language Support.

enumDescriptions: Specifies the input is in HTML
Specifies the input is in plain textual format
format.description:
The format of the source text, in either HTML (default) or plain-text. A
value of "html" indicates HTML and a value of "text" indicates plain-text.

model.description:
The `model` type requested for this translation. Valid values are
listed in public documentation.

source.description:
The language of the source text, set to one of the language codes listed in
Language Support. If the source language is not specified, the API will
attempt to identify the source language automatically and return it within
the response.

list.description: Translates input text, returning translated text.
Detects the language of text within a request.

q.description:
The input text upon which to perform language detection. Repeat this
parameter to perform language detection on multiple text inputs.

detect.description: Detects the language of text within a request.

title: Google Cloud Translation API

DetectionsResource.description: An array of languages which we detect for the given text The most likely language list first.

confidence.description: The confidence of the detection result of this language.

isReliable.description: A boolean to indicate is the language detection result reliable.

q.description:
The input text upon which to perform language detection. Repeat this
parameter to perform language detection on multiple text inputs.

DetectLanguageRequest.description: The request message for language detection.

language.description:
Supported language code, generally consisting of its ISO 639-1
identifier. (E.g. 'en', 'ja'). In certain cases, BCP-47 codes including
language + region identifiers are returned (e.g. 'zh-TW' and 'zh-CH')

name.description: Human readable name of the language localized to the target language.

TranslateTextRequest.description: The main translation request message for the Cloud Translation API.

target.description:
The language to use for translation of the input text, set to one of the
language codes listed in Language Support.

q.description:
The input text to translate. Repeat this parameter to perform translation
operations on multiple text inputs.

format.description:
The format of the source text, in either HTML (default) or plain-text. A
value of "html" indicates HTML and a value of "text" indicates plain-text.

model.description:
The `model` type requested for this translation. Valid values are
listed in public documentation.

source.description:
The language of the source text, set to one of the language codes listed in
Language Support. If the source language is not specified, the API will
attempt to identify the source language automatically and return it within
the response.

TranslationsListResponse.description: The main language translation response message.

translations.description: Translations contains list of translation results of given text

detections.description: A detections contains detection results of several text

languages.description: List of source/target languages supported by the translation API. If target parameter is unspecified, the list is sorted by the ASCII code point order of the language code. If target parameter is specified, the list is sorted by the collation order of the language name in the target language.

detectedSourceLanguage.description:
The source language of the initial request, detected automatically, if
no source language was passed within the initial request. If the
source language was passed, auto-detection of the language will not
occur and this field will be empty.

translatedText.description: Text translated into the target language.

model.description:
The `model` type used for this translation. Valid values are
listed in public documentation. Can be different from requested `model`.
Present only if specific model type was explicitly requested.

GetSupportedLanguagesRequest.description: The request message for discovering supported languages.

target.description:
The language to use to return localized, human readable names of supported
languages.

description:
The Google Cloud Translation API lets websites and programs integrate with
    Google Translate programmatically.

https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-tr.description: Translate text from one language to another using Google Translate

https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-pl.description: View and manage your data across Google Cloud Platform services

name: translate
